THESORCERESSMOD-CUNNING_SPARK.descriptio: At the start of each combat, gain [gold]Combat Advantage[/gold].
THESORCERESSMOD-CUNNING_SPARK.flavor: The smallest ember is all you need.
THESORCERESSMOD-CUNNING_SPARK.title: Cunning Spark
THESORCERESSMOD-SORCEROUS_SPARK.descript: At the start of each combat, gain [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Charisma[/gold] and [gold]Combat Advantage[/gold].
THESORCERESSMOD-SORCEROUS_SPARK.flavor: "A good enough lie can change the world. And I am the greatest lie ever told."
THESORCERESSMOD-SORCEROUS_SPARK.title: Sorcerous Spark
THESORCERESSMOD-FETCHING_HAT.description: At the start of each combat, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Charisma[/gold].
THESORCERESSMOD-FETCHING_HAT.title: Fetching Hat
THESORCERESSMOD-PRIMAL_FLAME.description: At the start of each combat, ALL enemies [gold]Prime[/gold] [blue]5[/blue].
THESORCERESSMOD-PRIMAL_FLAME.flavor: A strong enough will can ignite even the most distant and dormant ember.
THESORCERESSMOD-PRIMAL_FLAME.title: Primal Flame
THESORCERESSMOD-THROWING_KNIVES.descript: Whenever you gain [gold]Combat Advantage[/gold], draw a card.
THESORCERESSMOD-THROWING_KNIVES.flavor: A set of carefully balanced throwing knives. Worn beneath a cloak and drawn with a flick of the wrist.
THESORCERESSMOD-THROWING_KNIVES.title: Throwing Knives
THESORCERESSMOD-SILVERY_SWORDBREAKER.fla: A defensive sidearm that glows faintly with the promise of a future unwritten.
THESORCERESSMOD-WICKED_DAGGER.descriptio: [gold]Combat Advantage[/gold] increases the damage of your next attack by 75% instead of 50%.
THESORCERESSMOD-WICKED_DAGGER.flavor: A subtle enchantment keeps this blade untarnished by blood. Those stains must be carried by its wielder.
THESORCERESSMOD-WICKED_DAGGER.title: Wicked Dagger
THESORCERESSMOD-DUELING_SWORD.flavor: An agile weapon that rewards finesse. Less subtle than a dagger, but with a better sense of drama.
THESORCERESSMOD-DUELING_SWORD.title: Dueling Sword
THESORCERESSMOD-DANCING_SASH.flavor: Combat is like dancing and storytelling both: it's all about momentum.
THESORCERESSMOD-DANCING_SASH.title: Dancing Sash
THESORCERESSMOD-VOIDHEART.description: When your cards [gold]Shadowdance[/gold], they return to your [gold]Hand[/gold] instead of your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
THESORCERESSMOD-VOIDHEART.flavor: A sliver of power, carved from the hungering dark and nestled in the scar on your heart where you cut out the person you once were.
THESORCERESSMOD-VOIDHEART.title: Voidheart
